summary: Tested all Distribution Templates backend APIs (17/17 passed - 100%) and frontend UI. Backend: GET templates returns 6 system + custom templates, POST creates custom templates with name/description/icon/platform_ids, GET/{id} returns both system and custom templates, PUT updates custom templates (system templates protected), DELETE removes custom templates (system templates protected). Frontend: Templates tab visible as 4th tab, 6 system templates with correct icons/descriptions/platform tags, custom templates with edit/delete buttons, New Template form with platform multi-select, Distribute tab Quick Templates bar for one-click platform selection.

backend_api_tests.test: System templates have correct structure (id, name, description, icon, platform_ids, is_system)

frontend_tests.test: Distribution Hub page loads with 7 tabs
Templates tab visible in navigation (4th tab between Distribute and Delivery Tracking)
Templates tab shows 6 system templates with System badge
System templates display icons (radio, music, share, video, film, mic)
System templates show platform counts and descriptions
System templates show platform tags (first 5 + more count)
Custom templates section shows user templates
Custom templates have edit/delete buttons on hover
New Template button opens create form
Create form has name input, description input, icon selection
Create form has platform selection with category accordions
All 7 icon options visible (radio, music, share, video, film, mic, layers)
Distribute tab shows Quick Templates bar
Quick Templates bar shows all system templates with platform counts
Quick Templates bar shows custom templates
Clicking quick template selects platforms automatically (7 selected verified)
Edit button opens form pre-populated with existing data
Cancel button closes form without saving

custom_templates.protected_operations: System templates cannot be edited or deleted

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 system templates hardcoded in SYSTEM_TEMPLATES constant in distribution_hub_service.py
Custom template IDs properly prefixed with tpl_custom_ for easy identification
System template protection working correctly - returns 404 for edit/delete attempts
Frontend TemplateIcon component maps icon names to Lucide icons correctly
Quick Templates bar properly integrated with platform selection in Distribute tab
Platform count displays correctly match platform_ids array length
seed_data_creation: Custom templates created during testing: TEST_My Urban Stations, TEST_Playwright Template, TEST_Get Custom Template, TEST_Update Template Updated. Existing custom template: Urban Radio Push (6 platforms).

mocked_api.description: Templates feature is fully local - no external API integrations. Platform API pushes (when distributing via templates) are still mocked as noted in iteration_67.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Distribution Templates feature adds 5 new API endpoints under /api/distribution-hub/templates. 6 system templates are hardcoded (tpl_all_radio, tpl_major_streaming, tpl_social_blast, tpl_video_everywhere, tpl_film_distribution, tpl_podcast_push). Custom templates stored in distribution_hub_templates collection with tpl_custom_ prefix. Templates tab is 4th tab in Distribution Hub. Quick Templates bar available in Distribute tab for one-click platform selection. TEST_ prefixed custom templates exist from testing.
